scenarios.title: Agent Frameworks, Tooling, and Sandboxed LLM Workflows

scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `smolagents` when the request names `smolagents`, centers on building, debugging, and operate Hugging Face smolagents agents, tools, model providers, secure executors, CLIs, and UI workflows with self-contained references and helpers, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in agent frameworks tooling and sandboxed llm workflows.
